type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: As is present in the ash delivered to farmers in the area for land treatment (as a replacement for lime).  The amount of ash delivered (and therefore the amount of arsenic) is dependent on the lime requirement of the farmer's soil.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: Cd is present in the ash delivered to farmers in the area for use in a land treatment application (as a lime substitute).  The tonnage delivered annually varies based on the lime requirements of the farmer's soil.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Air concentrations mis-reported in 2018.  Should have read 6.6 kg.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: Mn is present in the ash delievered to farmers in the area for land treatment (as a replacement for lime).  The tonnage of ash delivered, and therefore the amount of Mn delivered, is dependent on the lime requirement of the farmer's soil.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment: Pb is contained in the ash delivered to farmers in the area.  The tonnage of ash delivered in 2018 was sufficient to exceed reportable quantities of lead.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: Mn is present inside the ash delivered to farmers.  The total tonnage of Mn delivered is dependent on tonnage of ash delivered, which in turn is dependent on the lime requirement of the farmer's soil.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment: Mn is present in ash that is delivered to farmers in the area as a soil treatment (lime replacement).  This causes the facility to exceed reportable limits for Mn.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment: The resin used at the site is an MDI/pMDI mixture at a 37.5/62.5 ratio.   Historical reports have not differentiated between the MDI and pMDI contained in the resin, and have reported all resin as pMDI.  Air releases were also only reported, rather than the actual amount of MDI and pMDI used.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The resin used at the site is an MDI/pMDI mixture at a 37.5/62.5 ratio.   Historical reports have not differentiated between the MDI and pMDI contained in the resin, and have reported all resin as pMDI.  Air releases were also only reported, rather than the actual amount of MDI and pMDI used.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Emission factors for the dryers are based off stack testing results.  The 2016 testing year resulted in abnormally low formaldehyde concentrations at the dryers.  These concentrations had been decreasing the emission rates.  The emission factor was recalculated for 2020 in order to include only the past 3 years (2018-2020), resulting in the increase in emission factor.
